array.string:
# Source .zshenv to get DEEPL_API_KEY source ~/.zshenv 2>/dev/null
# Set environment variable for launchd (GUI apps) if [ -n "$DEEPL_API_KEY" ]; then /bin/launchctl setenv DEEPL_API_KEY "$DEEPL_API_KEY" /usr/bin/logger "BMO: DEEPL_API_KEY set successfully for GUI apps" else /usr/bin/logger "BMO: ERROR - DEEPL_API_KEY not found in .zshenv" fi
